landing.description: A political arena where the forest itself speaks, through the use of artificial intelligence. Join the forest's inhabitants as they debate deforestation, rewilding, and the fate of their shared home.

meeting.selectIssue: please select an issue for the discussion

characters.title: THE BEINGS
characters.pleaseselect: please select 2-6 beings for the discussion
characters.unique: no two participants can have the same name, it becomes so confusing...
characters.requirename: all participating humans must have name and description
characters.humandesc: Enter a description for the human...

human.placeholder: Type your question or start recording...

replay.preamble: This is a replay of the meeting #{{meetingId}}: {{meetingTitle}} on {{meetingDate}}.
replay.click: Click here to start a new meeting.
replay.pressButton: Press the button to start a new meeting.

stillThere.title: Still there?
stillThere.body:
You have been inactive for a while,
press the button if you are still there.

about.label: About
about.body:
What would an ancient pine say about deforestation? How would fishes react to a hydropower plant? Can AI embody the wisdom of a river, a tree, or a reindeer herd?

Through AI, nonhuman entities—trees, fungi, rivers, and animals—gather to deliberate the fate of their shared home. Their voices are shaped by a mix of knowledge systems, including traditional and Indigenous worldviews, ecological science, and data. They are drawn from interviews and conversations with people living in and caring for the Vindelälven-Juhttátahkka biosphere reserve—reindeer herders, forest owners, rewilding organizations, pollinator experts, and cultural workers—each with a deep connection to the land.

Council of Forest functions as a forum where the forest's inhabitants voice their needs and consider the impact of human activities like logging, rewilding, and climate shifts. Humans are invited to listen, ask questions, and reflect. Each session concludes with a collective statement and a policy recommendation made by the forest. An experiment in ecological thinking and speculative design—exploring how technology can mediate between humans and the more-than-human world.

What does it mean to act in the forest's best interest? Whose knowledge counts? And what happens when we take nonhuman voices seriously?
about.creditLine:
a project by
<0>Nonhuman Nonsense</0>
in collaboration with <1>Biosphere Area Vindelälven-Juhttátahkka</1>

contact.label: Contact
contact.credits: The project is an initiative by art & design collective <nhn>Nonhuman Nonsense</nhn> developed in collaboration with <biosphere>Biosphere Area Vindelälven-Juhttátahkka</biosphere>, Daniela Nedelcheva, <gundega>Gundega Strauberga</gundega>, <jonas>Jonas Thunberg</jonas>, Johannes Rydinger, <albin>Albin Karlsson</albin>, and others.
contact.interviews: Based on interviews with Marja Skum, Göran Jonsson, Maidi Eira-Andersson, Anders Granér, Daniel Holmqvist, Erik Alnersson, Isak Landström, Tommy Sandström, Lisa Jonsson, Cecilia Wallinder, Angelika Schindler-Egl, Bertil Nygren.
contact.funding: Council of Forest is funded by <vinnova>Vinnova (ref. nr. 2025-00344)</vinnova> and is a continuation of the project <cof>Council of Foods</cof> which has received funding from the European Union's <horizon>Horizon Europe research and innovation programme under grant agreement 101069990</horizon>.
contact.euImageAlt: Funded by the EU, as part of S+T+ARTS

button.title: Button
button.bridgeNotRunningHint: Start the button bridge on this Mac, or check {{logPath}} for errors.
button.usbNotDetectedHint: Plug in the Council button via USB. The bridge scans for Arduino USB devices automatically.
button.usbWrongDeviceHint: A USB serial device was found, but it is not running Council button firmware. Reflash the Arduino sketch or check the USB cable/port.

reset.title: Start over?
reset.default: This will start everything from the beginning.
reset.changeTopic: Changing topic will start everything from the beginning.
reset.lang:
It is not possible to change language in the middle of an ongoing meeting.
Do you want to start over from the beginning?

name.title: SAY SOMETHING
name.prompt: Do you want to adress the Council of Forest?
name.instructions:
Please enter your name to raise a request to speak,
and then wait until you are given the floor by River, the moderator.
name.unique: name must be unique in the council

controls.wait: wait for your turn to speak

queryExtension.title: Is that it?
queryExtension.body:
This meeting is starting to get long-winded,
is it time to come to a conclusion?

incomplete.title: Meeting Unfinished
incomplete.body:
Oh, it looks like this meeting was never finished.
Would you like to resume the meeting now?

meetingElsewhere.title: Meeting happening elsewhere
meetingElsewhere.body:
This meeting is currently in session somewhere else,
check back later to see if it finished, or start a new meeting.

banner.pressToRestart: Press the button to start a new meeting.

disclaimer.intro: This document was created by the Council of Forest, a political arena where the forest itself speaks, through the use of artificial intelligence. While every effort has been made to generate meaningful content, please note the following:

items.misinformation: This document may contain misinformation, outdated details, propaganda, or bad ideas.
items.notResearch: The discussions may provide useful insights and reflect diverse ethical positions but should not replace evidence-based research or deep contemplation.
items.takeAction: Don't just chat about it—get up and take action!

disclaimer.attribution: Council of Forest is an initiative by art & design collective <nhn>Nonhuman Nonsense</nhn>, which has received funding from <vinnova>Vinnova (ref. nr. 2025-00344)</vinnova>.
